- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - React frontend with React Leaflet for map visualization
  - TypeScript support
  - CSS styling with light/dark theme support
  - Responsive design

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created Vite React project with TypeScript template
  - Set up project structure with src, public directories
  - Configured TypeScript compilation settings

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Created main App component with map visualization
  - Implemented reactive Leaflet map with markers
  - Built sidebar with network tools and filters
  - Added responsive layout with flexbox
  - Created global and component-specific CSS

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No extensions required for development

- [x] Compile the Project
  - All TypeScript files configured and ready
  - Dependencies defined in package.json

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Dev server configured to run on port 3000
  - Build task configured for production builds
  - Preview task available for testing builds

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Ready to run with: npm install && npm run dev
